summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GetLocal V2 phone number extraction, credit unlock loop, and smart match features. All core functionality working perfectly including phone generation, masking/unmasking, credit deduction, and match score calculations with proper color coding.
passed_tests: Audio upload API generates mock phone numbers in correct +91 XXXXX XXXXX format
Background processing triggers after 5 seconds and populates phone field in MongoDB
Phone masking correctly shows +91 XX*** ***** format for locked candidates
Smart Match score calculation: 1 yr=55%, 2 yr=70%, 3 yr=85%, 4 yr=88%, 5 yr=91%, 7 yr=97%
Match Score color coding: RED (<70%), AMBER (70-84%), GREEN (>=85%)
Unlock button deducts exactly 10 credits from wallet (tested: 80→70 credits)
Phone number fully revealed after unlock (+91 94321 57659)
Call Now button replaces Unlock button after successful unlock
Credits display updates in header immediately after unlock
Call Now button has correct tel: link for phone dialing
Wallet API correctly tracks unlocked candidates list
Phone format validation: all generated phones follow +91 XXXXX XXXXX pattern
Match score color classes applied correctly (green/amber/red backgrounds)
Audio upload for multiple languages (en/hi/te) generates language-specific data
Background mock transcription processing completes within 7 seconds

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All phone masking, unlock flow, and match scoring working)
